$comment: Lab Map - VLAN Segmentation Page Schema
title: VLAN segmentation page topology
description: JSON Schema for vlan.json — defines VLAN network segmentation including VLAN clusters, member node assignments, subnets, gateways, and inter-VLAN firewall rules. This schema validates data used by the VLAN page view in the Lab Map application. VLANs are displayed as collapsible clusters that can be expanded to show member nodes.

nodes.$comment: Array of VLAN segments and member nodes
nodes.description: List of all nodes in the VLAN page. This includes both VLAN segment nodes (clusters) with subnet configuration, and individual machine/service nodes that belong to VLANs.

edges.$comment: Array of VLAN membership and inter-VLAN connections
edges.description: List of all edges in the VLAN page. Edge types include: member (node belongs to VLAN), intervlan (router connection between VLANs), and wan (external uplink).

vlanMeta.$comment: VLAN segment metadata - subnet, gateway, DHCP, members
vlanMeta.description: Metadata for a VLAN segment node containing network configuration (subnet, gateway, DHCP), member list, virtual IPs, and inter-VLAN firewall rules.

vlanId.description: 802.1Q VLAN ID (1-4094). Common ranges: 1-999 for user VLANs, 1000+ for infrastructure.

name.description: VLAN name (e.g., Management, Servers, IoT, Guest)

gateway.description: Default gateway IP address for this VLAN (typically .1 of subnet)

dhcpRange.description: DHCP range if DHCP is enabled (e.g., 10.0.10.100-10.0.10.200)

members.description: Array of hostnames that are members of this VLAN

vips.description: Array of virtual IP addresses (macvlan) assigned to services in this VLAN

interVlanRules.description: Array of inter-VLAN firewall rules (e.g., 'Allow VLAN 10 -> VLAN 20 port 443')

captivePortal.description: Whether captive portal is enabled for this VLAN (typically for Guest networks)

note.description: Additional notes about this VLAN segment

machineMeta.description: Metadata for a machine or service node that is a member of one or more VLANs.

role.description: Brief role description (e.g., Primary NAS, DNS Server, K3s Control Plane)

ip.description: Primary IP address in its home VLAN

vlan.description: Array of VLAN IDs this node belongs to (for multi-homed devices)

hostedOn.description: Physical host if this is a VM or container

node.$comment: VLAN page node definition - either VLAN segment or machine
node.description: A VLAN page node representing either a VLAN segment (cluster) or a machine/service that belongs to VLANs. The meta type depends on the node type.

id.description: Unique identifier for this node (used in edge from/to references)

label.description: Display label shown on the graph

type.description: Node type determining visual style and icon. Must match a folder name in public/node-icons/.

meta.description: Node metadata - vlanMeta for VLAN segments, machineMeta for machine nodes

oneOf.description: VLAN segment node — requires vlanId, name, and subnet fields
Machine/VIP/internet node — requires hostname and role fields

intervlanEdgeMeta.$comment: Inter-VLAN edge metadata - firewall rule summary
intervlanEdgeMeta.description: Optional metadata for inter-VLAN edges specifying allowed services and default deny behavior.

allowed.description: Array of allowed services/ports between these VLANs (e.g., 'HTTPS (443)', 'SSH (22)')

denied.description: Default deny behavior description (e.g., 'All other traffic denied')

edge.$comment: VLAN page edge definition - membership or inter-VLAN connection
edge.description: A VLAN page edge representing either VLAN membership (node belongs to VLAN) or inter-VLAN routing with firewall rules.

from.description: Source endpoint with required nodeId and optional port

to.description: Target endpoint with required nodeId and optional port

type.description: Edge type: wan (ISP uplink), member (node is member of VLAN), intervlan (router routes between VLANs), gateway-link (dedicated router/gateway connection)

label.description: Display label for this edge (can be empty string)

arrows.description: Arrow direction for vis-network (e.g., to, from, to;from)

meta.description: Additional metadata for inter-VLAN edges (allowed/denied rules)

edgeEndpoint.description: Edge endpoint containing node reference and optional port identifier.
